actionUnits.condition: Verify ButtonVR MonoBehaviour settings: MonoBehaviour id 948828964 on GameObject 948828962 uses script guid 7401fcbb2352a5d4aa45b4e4cd766f3f (class ButtonVR). BoxCollider id 948828967 has isTrigger=1. OnTriggerEnter with other tag 'hand' invokes UnityEvent onPress; per m_Calls it targets MonoBehaviour 1250790196 (LoopManager) calling ButtonPressed() with no args. OnTriggerExit invokes onRelease (no persistent calls). This step directly invokes the mapped onPress call to validate the scene’s persistent event configuration.

Verify MonoBehaviour id 169359324 on GameObject 169359321 uses script guid d84ff1f9c82018d42a92710dbf9695df (class FinalDoor). BoxCollider id 169359323 has isTrigger=1, enabling OnTriggerEnter/Exit. Call FinalDoor.openFinalDoor() to set canOpen=true before re-entering the trigger, so OnTriggerEnter will set isOpened=true and Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger").

Verify MonoBehaviour id 1650952632 on GameObject 1650952629 uses script guid d84ff1f9c82018d42a92710dbf9695df (class FinalDoor). BoxCollider id 1650952631 has isTrigger=1, enabling OnTriggerEnter/Exit. Call FinalDoor.openFinalDoor() to set canOpen=true so the next trigger entry opens the door (Animator.SetTrigger("DoorTrigger")).

MonoBehaviour id 479130727 on GameObject 479130725 is configured from script guid f62a7ab4f006a5c4f8ff5342c43c441f (class inFinalRoom). BoxCollider id 479130728 has m_IsTrigger=1. No m_Calls are defined on this component.
